overall.description: A cinematic walk through a foggy, storm-lit waterfront district in a futuristic city (Cyberpunk 2077). The camera follows pedestrians from a covered parking area onto a promenade lined with palm trees and large digital billboards, with heavy orange fog limiting visibility over the water. A flying vehicle passes overhead as the camera approaches two mysterious figures standing in the mist.

events.description: exits covered parking structure into open foggy waterfront area

agents.ego_description: following a woman in a white sleeveless top through the parking garage toward the exit

notable_agents.action: woman in white top walking ahead of camera toward the exit

entered.detail: concrete ceiling and pillars of the parking garage
vehicles parked along the left side with headlights on
bold yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing markings on blue floor
structural support columns lining the right side of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment begins inside a covered parking garage with concrete pillars and parked cars. The camera follows a woman in a white top toward the exit, transitioning from the artificial lighting of the garage into the foggy, orange-lit waterfront area ahead.

agents.ego_description: walking along the open promenade following a woman in a green jacket

notable_agents.action: woman in green jacket walking ahead toward the foggy waterfront

entered.detail: large modern building with glass facade housing digital displays
large illuminated advertising screens showing colorful graphics
tall palm trees swaying in the wind against the orange foggy sky
short posts lining the edge of the walkway

segments.scene_description: Having exited the garage, the camera walks along an open waterfront promenade lined with palm trees. A modern building with large digital billboards stands to the right, glowing against the heavy orange fog that limits visibility. The path continues toward the water's edge.

agents.ego_description: walking alone along the water's edge with no other pedestrians visible

entered.detail: silver metal safety railing along the waterfront edge
calm water surface reflecting the orange ambient light through heavy fog

segments.scene_description: The path narrows along the water's edge, with a metal railing separating the walkway from the fog-obscured ocean. The buildings and billboards fall behind as the camera moves into a more isolated section of the promenade, with only the silhouettes of distant palm trees visible through the orange haze.

events.description: flying vehicle with blue lights passes overhead through the fog
camera approaches two stationary figures standing in the fog ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing along the curved path, approaching two figures standing motionless in the fog

notable_agents.action: two figures standing still in the fog facing the camera's direction

entered.detail: wooden and concrete seating arrangements along the walkway
tall lamp posts illuminating the fog with white light
futuristic aerial vehicle with blue lights flying through the fog

segments.scene_description: The path curves back toward the commercial area, with benches and street lights lining the route. The waterfront building and its digital billboards reappear through the fog. A flying vehicle suddenly passes overhead, its blue lights cutting through the orange haze, as the camera approaches two mysterious stationary figures standing ahead in the mist.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the sterile interior of a parking garage into a dense, orange-hued futuristic waterfront. It begins by following a woman in a white top past concrete pillars and parked cars, transitioning from artificial indoor lighting into the heavy, glowing fog of the outdoors. As the camera emerges onto an open promenade, the scene expands to reveal palm trees and a modern building with luminous digital billboards that pierce through the haze. The path then narrows along a metal railing at the water's edge, where the commercial structures fade into the background and the environment becomes an isolated stretch of orange mist and distant silhouettes. Finally, the route curves back toward the city lights and benches just as a flying vehicle with blue lights streaks overhead, leading the camera toward two mysterious figures standing stationary in the fog.
